code: import{invoke}from"@forge/bridge";export const getProject=projectId=>{return invoke("getProject");};export const projectApi=()=>{return{get:projectId=>{return invoke("getProject");},connect:(projectId,portfolioId)=>{return invoke("connectProjectToPortfolio",{portfolioId});},disconnect:projectId=>{return invoke("disconnectProjectToPortfolio");},getSelectedIssueType:projectId=>{return invoke("getSelectedIssueType");},setSelectedIssueType:(projectId,issueTypeId)=>{return invoke("setSelectedIssueType",{issueTypeId});},getSelectedIssueStatuses:projectId=>{return invoke("getSelectedIssueStatuses");},setSelectedIssueStatuses:(projectId,issueStatusesIds)=>{return invoke("setSelectedIssueStatuses",{issueStatusesIds});},setBudgetDetails:(expectedBenefit,expectedCosts,postfix)=>{return invoke("setBudgetDetails",{expectedBenefit,expectedCosts,postfix});},getBudgetDetails:()=>{return invoke("getBudgetDetails");},reset:projectId=>{return invoke("resetProject");}};};
